text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: hselasky

New revision: 305830

Log:
  MFC r305590:
  Correctly map the USB mouse tilt delta values into buttons 5 and 6
  instead of 3 and 4 which is used for the scroll wheel, according to
  X.org.

  PR:		170358

_U  stable/9/sys/
  stable/9/sys/dev/usb/input/ums.c
